description: Your university rocketry team is preparing for the Spaceport America Cup with a target apogee of 3048 meters (10,000 feet AGL). As the propulsion engineer, use the base rocket design at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/motor_sweep.ork to conduct a parametric motor study and identify the optimal motor for the target altitude. Export the comparison data to /home/ga/Documents/exports/motor_comparison.csv and save a motor selection report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/motor_selection_report.txt.
